title: Real Estate Brokers
description: Operate real estate office, or work for commercial real estate firm, overseeing real estate transactions. Other duties usually include selling real estate or renting properties and arranging loans.

tasks.text: Sell, for a fee, real estate owned by others.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Obtain agreements from property owners to place properties for sale with real estate firms.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Act as an intermediary in negotiations between buyers and sellers over property prices and settlement details and during the closing of sales.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Generate lists of properties for sale, their locations, descriptions, and available financing options, using computers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Manage or operate real estate offices, handling associated business details.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Compare a property with similar properties that have recently sold to determine its competitive market price.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain knowledge of real estate law, local economies, fair housing laws, types of available mortgages, financing options, and government programs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor fulfillment of purchase contract terms to ensure that they are handled in a timely manner.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Check work completed by loan officers, attorneys, or other professionals to ensure that it is performed properly.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Rent properties or manage rental properties.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain awareness of current income tax regulations, local zoning, building and tax laws, and growth possibilities of a property's area.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Arrange for title searches of properties being sold.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Appraise property values, assessing income potential when relevant.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Supervise agents who handle real estate transactions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Arrange for financing of property purchases.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Give buyers virtual tours of properties in which they are interested, using computers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Review property details to ensure that environmental regulations are met.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.
